product_name: E.T. Phone Home! Cartridge (Atari 8-Bit Computer, RX8030)
condition_notes: The computer-line E.T., distinct from its infamous 2600 cousin — E.T. Phone Home! on Atari's RX8030 (1983). The label has gone dark and worn with age, and it is priced accordingly. Loose, used, untested; from a single-owner estate.. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is. PHOTO SET INCOMPLETE: front label only; back/contacts, condition close-up, and a scale shot still needed.
